languages.title: Ede
languages.subtitle: Yan ede ti a lo jakejado app naa.
languages.noResults: Ko si ede ti o baamu wiwa rẹ.

phone.label: Nomba fonu
phone.searchCountry: Ṣawari orilẹ-ede, koodu, tabi pipe pipe
phone.noCountries: Ko si orilẹ-ede ti o baamu wiwa rẹ.
phone.tooLong: Nọmba foonu yi ti gun ju.
phone.invalid: Tẹ nọmba foonu to wulo fun orilẹ-ede ti o yan.

auth.onboardingTagline: Alabaṣepọ aabo ara ẹni fun awọn akoko laarin “Mo wa dara” ati “Mo nilo iranlọwọ.”
auth.createSubtitle: Yan ọna iwọle lati daabobo aworan atọka aabo rẹ.
auth.signInFailedMessage: A ko le pari iwọle. Ṣayẹwo asopọ rẹ ki o tun gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Lilo igba idagbasoke agbegbe. Ilu abinibi Google Wọle n ṣiṣẹ ni kikọ idagbasoke kan.
auth.northStarSubtitle: So pọ ni bayi tabi tẹsiwaju ki o ṣafikun nigbamii.
auth.northStarBody: TheVL01 wearable le ma nfa awọn ṣiṣan ailewu pẹlu taps ati awọn afarajuwe titẹ gigun.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Alabaṣepọ aabo onirẹlẹ lori maapu ati ninu awọn ipe.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear le ṣe iranlọwọ pẹlu ipo ile, ipo alabojuto, ipo pajawiri, awọn ipe awawi, ati atilẹyin ohun.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Ti a lo fun maapu naa, awọn agbegbe eewu, dide ailewu, ati SOS ọrọ-ọrọ.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving beere fun ipo ki awọn alabojuto le ni oye ibiti iranlọwọ le nilo. O le yi eyi pada nigbamii ni Eto.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Awọn iwifunni ṣe atilẹyin awọn iṣayẹwo ati awọn iṣẹlẹ pajawiri.
permissions.notificationsBody: A lo awọn iwifunni nikan fun awọn itara aabo, awọn imudojuiwọn pajawiri, ati awọn olurannileti ti o mu ṣiṣẹ.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Ipo jẹ ki ọrọ-ọrọ ailewu jẹ deede
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving nlo ipo rẹ fun maapu aabo, awọn agbegbe eewu, pinpin iyara, ati SOS ipo. O le yi eyi pada nigbamii ni Eto.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Awọn itaniji aabo nilo awọn iwifunni
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving nfiranṣẹ awọn olurannileti wiwa wọle, awọn imudojuiwọn pajawiri, ati awọn igbesẹ aabo ti o mu ṣiṣẹ. A ko lo awọn iwifunni fun ipolowo.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving nlo gbohungbohun rẹ nikan nigbati o ba bẹrẹ AI ẹlẹgbẹ tabi ipe aabo.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving nlo Bluetooth lati so pọ pẹlu NorthStar ohun ọṣọ, ka ipo asopọ, ati okunfa aabo sisan lati awọn wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving nlo kamẹra nikan nigbati o yan lati ya fọto profaili tabi pin aworan ailewu kan.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving jẹ ki sisan yii wa lati Eto ati dasibodu naa.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Yan ohùn ẹlẹgbẹ ti o ni ailewu julọ lati gbọ.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Pin ọrọ-ọrọ pẹlu awọn eniyan ti o gbẹkẹle.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Tẹ ni kia kia marun le pọ si SOS ati awọn itaniji alabojuto.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Ṣẹda idi ore-ọfẹ lati lọ kuro ni ipo ti korọrun.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Bẹrẹ ipe alabagbepo akoko gidi nigbati o nilo atilẹyin.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Gbiyanju awọn ṣiṣan aabo ni demo titẹ-kekere.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Jeki awọn ohun ọṣọ wa nitosi lakoko ti o n ṣayẹwo.
jewelry.noDevices: Ko si ohun elo NorthStar nitosi sibẹsibẹ.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth ọlọjẹ ko le bẹrẹ. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
jewelry.scanFailed: A ko le ri awọn ohun ọṣọ nitosi. Ṣayẹwo Bluetooth, tọju NorthStar sunmọ, ki o si gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth ayẹwo ko le bẹrẹ. Ṣayẹwo Bluetooth wiwọle ki o si gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Wiwọle si ẹrọ ti o wa nitosi wa ni pipa. Gba Bluetooth wọle sinu Eto, lẹhinna gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar gba akoko pupọ lati sopọ. Gbe e sunmọ ki o tun gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
jewelry.connectFailed: A ko le sopọ si NorthStar. Ṣayẹwo pe o ti gba agbara ati nitosi, lẹhinna gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Ko si awọn ẹrọ to wa nitosi sibẹsibẹ
jewelry.emptyMessage: Jeki idiyele NorthStar ati sunmọ foonu yii, lẹhinna ṣayẹwo lẹẹkansi.

home.subtitle: Dasibodu ẹlẹgbẹ aabo
home.readyBody: Ohùn, maapu, awọn ohun-ọṣọ, ati awọn alabojuto jẹ ọkan tẹ ni kia kia.
home.noDevice: Ko si ẹrọ ti o sopọ

map.title: maapu aabo
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go awotẹlẹ; Mapbox ṣe ni kikọ idagbasoke kan.
map.updateFailed: A ko le ṣe imudojuiwọn ipo rẹ. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
map.notRequested: A ko beere wiwọle si ipo. O le mu ṣiṣẹ nigbamii lati Eto.
map.permissionOff: Wiwọle ipo wa ni pipa. Mu ṣiṣẹ ni Eto lati aarin maapu ailewu lori rẹ.
map.timeout: Ipo rẹ n gba to gun ju ti a reti lọ. Gbe lọ si ibikan pẹlu ifihan ti o mọ ki o gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Ko si awọn aaye ti o fipamọ sibẹsibẹ
map.savedEmptyMessage: Awọn aaye igbẹkẹle ti o fipamọ yoo han nibi fun iraye si yara.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Nsopọ ni aabo si ẹlẹgbẹ ohun rẹ...

messagesWaiting.other: %{count} awọn ifiranṣẹ ti nduro lati firanṣẹ

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Bẹrẹ ipe tabi tẹ ifiranṣẹ sii nigbati o ba ṣetan.

history.clearMessage: Eyi yọ awọn ifipamọ AI awọn ifiranṣẹ ẹlẹgbẹ kuro ninu ẹrọ yii.
history.title: Itan ibaraẹnisọrọ
history.subtitle: AI awọn ifiranṣẹ ẹlẹgbẹ ti a fipamọ sori ẹrọ yii.
history.empty: Ko si awọn ibaraẹnisọrọ ti o fipamọ sibẹsibẹ.
history.emptyMessage: Awọn ibaraẹnisọrọ AI ẹlẹgbẹ rẹ yoo han nibi lẹhin ipe akọkọ rẹ.
history.loadFailed: A ko le kojọpọ itan ibaraẹnisọrọ. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
history.clearFailed: A ko le ko itan-akọọlẹ ibaraẹnisọrọ kuro. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
history.deleteFailed: A ko le pa ibaraẹnisọrọ yẹn rẹ. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.

voices.title: Awọn ohun ipe aabo mi
voices.subtitle: Yan ohùn ẹlẹgbẹ ti o ni itara lati gbọ.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Ayẹwo ohun yii ko le dun. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Lo awọn idahun ẹlẹgbẹ idapọ nigbati nẹtiwọki tabi Hume awọn iwe-ẹri ko si.
settings.privacyBody: Ṣe okeere tabi paarẹ data agbegbe ti o fipamọ sori ẹrọ.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ko le ṣe okeere data rẹ ni bayi.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Pa gbogbo data agbegbe rẹ bi?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Eyi yoo yọ profaili rẹ kuro, eto, awọn olubasọrọ pajawiri, itan-ibaraẹnisọrọ, awọn olurannileti igbanilaaye, ati igba ifọwọsi agbegbe lati ẹrọ yii.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ko le pa data agbegbe rẹ ni bayi.

sections.languageSubtitle: Ni wiwo ati ede igbanilaaye eto
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, alabojuto, ati awọn olubasọrọ pajawiri
sections.privacySubtitle: Itan, okeere, piparẹ, ati eto imulo

settings.updateFailedMessage: A ko le fi ayanfẹ yẹn pamọ. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Ikoko rẹ ṣi ṣiṣẹ. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.

contacts.title: Awọn olubasọrọ pajawiri
contacts.subtitle: Awọn eniyan ti o gbẹkẹle wa lakoko awọn ṣiṣan ailewu.
contacts.name: Oruko
contacts.empty: Ko si awọn olubasọrọ pajawiri ti a ṣafikun sibẹsibẹ.
contacts.emptyTitle: Ko si awọn olubasọrọ pajawiri sibẹsibẹ
contacts.emptyMessage: Ṣafikun ẹnikan ti o gbẹkẹle ki wọn ṣetan nigbati ṣiṣan ailewu nilo wọn.
contacts.removeMessage: Eniyan yii ko ni farahan ninu sisan pajawiri rẹ mọ.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: A ko le fi olubasọrọ yi pamọ. Ṣayẹwo awọn alaye naa ki o tun gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: A ko le yọ olubasọrọ yii kuro. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.

device.title: Iṣakoso ẹrọ
device.subtitle: Ṣakoso ẹrọ NorthStar rẹ.
device.none: Ko si awọn ẹrọ ti o sopọ

friends.title: Awọn ọrẹ
friends.subtitle: Awọn oluṣọ, awọn ibeere, ati aworan pajawiri.
friends.emptyMessage: Awọn ọrẹ ti o gbẹkẹle ati awọn alabojuto yoo han nibi ni kete ti wọn ba ṣafikun.

emergency.title: Pajawiri SOS
emergency.subtitle: Ilọsiwaju nikan nigbati o nilo atilẹyin lẹsẹkẹsẹ.
emergency.body: Eyi yoo sọ fun sisan aabo rẹ ati mura awọn olubasọrọ pajawiri.
emergency.addContact: Fi olubasọrọ pajawiri kun ni Eto.
emergency.quickShareMessage: stub pinpin ipo ti šetan. So aaye ipari ipin ẹhin lati firanṣẹ awọn ọna asopọ laaye.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tẹ ni kia kia
capybearTap.subtitle: Tẹ NorthStar rẹ lẹẹmeji lati ju osan aabo kan silẹ.
capybearTap.body: Ipa-ọna afarajuwe ti ṣetan fun wiwọ iṣẹlẹ iṣẹlẹ BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: O dabi aisinipo. Ifiranṣẹ rẹ yoo ranṣẹ nigbati o ba tun sopọ.
errors.voiceQueued: Fifiranṣẹ pamọ. Yoo firanṣẹ nigbati ẹlẹgbẹ ohun ba tun sopọ.
errors.voiceRetrying: Gbiyanju lati fi ifiranṣẹ rẹ ranṣẹ lẹẹkansi...
errors.voiceConnecting: Nsopọ ni aabo si ẹlẹgbẹ ohun rẹ...
errors.microphone: A nilo wiwọle si gbohungbohun fun awọn ipe ohun. O le muu ṣiṣẹ ni Eto, tabi tẹ ifiranṣẹ dipo.
errors.billing: Ẹgbẹ ohun ori ayelujara ko si fun igba diẹ. O le tẹsiwaju pẹlu aisinipo ẹlẹgbẹ.
errors.authentication: Alabaṣepọ ohun ko le jẹrisi igba yii. Wọle lẹẹkansi tabi lo ẹlẹgbẹ aisinipo fun bayi.
errors.timeout: Alabaṣepọ ohun naa pẹ ju lati dahun. Ṣayẹwo asopọ rẹ ki o tun gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
errors.network: A ko le de ọdọ ẹlẹgbẹ ohun. Ṣayẹwo asopọ rẹ, lẹhinna gbiyanju lẹẹkansi tabi tẹsiwaju offline.
errors.genericVoice: Nkankan da ipe ohun duro. Gbiyanju lẹẹkansi, tabi tẹsiwaju pẹlu aisinipo ẹlẹgbẹ.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving nilo iraye si gbohungbohun fun aabo ati AI awọn ipe ẹlẹgbẹ.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving nlo ipo rẹ fun maapu aabo ati awọn ẹya aabo nitosi.
ios.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: VeryLoving nlo ipo rẹ lati ṣe atilẹyin wiwa-ailewu ati ṣiṣan pajawiri.
ios.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving n lo ipo abẹlẹ fun wiwa-ailewu ati awọn ẹya agbegbe-ewu nitosi.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving nlo kamẹra nikan nigbati o yan lati ya profaili tabi fọto ailewu.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VeryLoving nlo ile-ikawe fọto rẹ nikan nigbati o yan profaili kan tabi aworan ailewu.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving nlo Bluetooth lati sopọ si NorthStar ohun ọṣọ aabo rẹ.
ios.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: VeryLoving nlo Bluetooth lati sopọ si NorthStar ohun ọṣọ aabo rẹ.
